open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] feat: add l_strtof (float32 string parsing)
[Repo Assist] fix: l_qsort buffer overflow for element sizes > 256 bytes
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_strcmp for aligned inputs
[Repo Assist] feat: add l_strsep (BSD-style string separator)
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_memmove backward path + fix missing test_support.h
[Repo Assist] test: add %lld/%llu/%p/%zu snprintf coverage + l_valid_hostname unit tests
[Repo Assist] fix: add missing tests/test_support.h — unblocks all test shard builds

notes: No human-authored issues. Seven open Repo Assist PRs: #85 strtof, #86 qsort fix, #87 strcmp perf, #88 strsep, #91 memmove perf + test_support.h fix, #92 test coverage (snprintf lld/llu/p/zu + l_valid_hostname), #93 standalone test_support.h fix (critical: unblocks all builds). PRs #85/#86/#87/#88 were rebased onto main this run (resolved test/test.c -> tests/test_strings.c conflict). Main branch is broken without test_support.h until #93 is merged. Pre-existing l_setenv failure on Linux (environment limitation). Next: buffered I/O helpers (l_fopen-style).
